data.title: Tharimmune Joins Canton Network as Super Validator to Enhance Security
data.description: Tharimmune, a Nasdaq-listed company, has announced its role as a super validator on the Canton Network. According to Foresight News, this move aims to bolster the security of network transactions and strengthen its digital asset financial strategy through Canton Coin (CC) rewards. Established in November 2025, Tharimmune's differentiated digital asset financial strategy focuses on acquiring CC and acting as a super validator to drive value. The company also plans to invest in applications on the Canton Network to accelerate institutional use and market adoption.

data.title: VanEck Launches First U.S. AVAX Spot ETF on Nasdaq
data.description: VanEck has introduced the first AVAX spot ETF in the United States, named VAVX, which is set to debut on Nasdaq today. According to ChainCatcher, the ETF will stake a portion of its AVAX holdings, with rewards distributed to holders after deducting fees. VanEck previously announced that it would waive fees on the first $500 million of assets flowing into the ETF.

data.title: Strategy Acquires Additional Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: Strategy has increased its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring 2,932 Bitcoin between January 19 and January 25. According to NS3.AI, this acquisition is valued at approximately $264.1 million. As of January 25, the company possesses a total of 712,647 Bitcoin, with an average purchase price of $76,037. This update was announced by Michael Saylor on the social platform X.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Major Price Drop Amid Japanese Financial Instability
data.description: Bitcoin saw a substantial price decline over the weekend, leading to $750 million in crypto liquidations, mainly from long positions. According to NS3.AI, this downturn is associated with financial instability in Japan, marked by a significant depreciation of the yen and a selloff in bonds, affecting broader risk assets. Investors are shifting towards traditional safe havens such as gold and silver, indicating increased market caution.

data.title: VanEck's AVAX ETF debuts on Nasdaq today.
data.description: Avalanche announced on its X platform that the VAVX ETF, a U.S. AVAX spot ETF launched by ETF issuer VanEck, will be listed on Nasdaq today (Monday). It is understood that the ETF will pledge a portion of its AVAX holdings, with the resulting rewards (after deducting fees) being returned to holders. VanEck previously stated that it would waive fees for the first $500 million in inflows.

data.title: Everything Secures $6.9 Million in Seed Funding to Revolutionize Derivatives Trading
data.description: Everything has successfully raised $6.9 million in a seed funding round, attracting investment from prominent entities such as Humanity, Animoca Brands, and the founder of WallStreetBets. According to NS3.AI, the project aims to simplify perpetual contract trading by integrating the Humanity real-person verification system, which is designed to enhance trust and security. This innovative approach seeks to tackle significant challenges within the derivatives market, making it more accessible and user-friendly for traders.

data.title: US-listed OFA launches Hearth, a tokenization platform for RWA.
data.description: OFA Group, a US-listed company, officially launched Hearth, a tokenized real-asset (RWA) platform, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Hearth Labs, Inc. The platform aims to provide structured services for the issuance, distribution, and lifecycle management of tokenized real assets. Initially, it will focus on OFA's own and affiliated assets, but will expand to include third-party asset issuers in the future. Hearth's current features include the distribution of RWA products sponsored by OFA Asset Management, project issuance structures for special purpose entities (SPVs), investor onboarding and primary issuance access, as well as a platform infrastructure for compliant issuance workflows and asset-level disclosure. According to the announcement, Hearth will support the distribution of third-party sponsored real-asset products, secondary trading capabilities, enhanced liquidity, and more asset classes and cross-platform integration in the future. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Aster launches CMC20 spot trading incentives and RIVER perpetual contract trading activities.
data.description: Aster has launched a CMC20 spot trading incentive program and a RIVER perpetual contract trading program. The details are as follows: 1. CMC20 Spot Trading Incentive Program: Spot Trading Pair: CMC20/USDT Listing Time: January 26, 12:00 (UTC) Program Period: January 26, 12:00 (UTC) – February 25, 14:00 (UTC) Reward Pool: $50,000 equivalent ASTER Trading Boost: During the program, CMC20/USDT spot trading will receive a 1.2x Symbol Boost reward. Reward Mechanism: Rewards are calculated based on CMC20/USDT spot trading fees during the program. Boost Rules: For every hour of continuous holding of ≥0.5 CMC20, a +0.1x boost is awarded (cumulative). The maximum reward per user is 3%. Wash trading and Sybil behavior will be filtered out. Rewards will only be awarded to accounts with ≥1 $ASTER and accumulated fees >5 USD. 2. The RIVER USDT perpetual contract trading incentive program details are as follows: Program Period: January 26, 12:00 (UTC) – February 1, 12:00 (UTC) Reward Pool: $25,000 equivalent ASTER Reward Mechanism: OI Leaderboard Reward ($50%, $12,500): Shared among the top 10 traders in the OI Score ranking; OI Score = Σ(Position Size × Holding Time (hours)); Only positions held for ≥1 hour are counted; Eligibility Requirements (Top 10 only): Cumulative RIVERUSDT perpetual contract trading volume ≥ $1 million. Those who do not meet this requirement will forfeit their ranking reward eligibility. Participation Reward ($50%, $12,500): Open to users other than the top 10 on the leaderboard; Cumulative RIVERUSDT perpetual contract trading volume ≥ $10,000.

data.title: Analysis: The crypto market may continue to fluctuate until a clear catalyst emerges; BTC failed to break through the $95,000-$98,000 resistance level.
data.description: A Bitfinex Alpha report notes that Bitcoin's upward attempt stalled, with the price failing to hold the $95,000-$98,000 resistance level and retreating back into its established range. After reaching a high of $97,850 in mid-January, Bitcoin has fallen by more than 10%, breaking below its year-opening price. Spot buying momentum weakened, and ETF outflows intensified. Derivatives positions have been adjusted in an orderly manner, and volatility remains confined to short-term contracts, indicating that market caution is event-driven rather than driven by broader market mechanism shifts. Without a recovery in spot and ETF demand, Bitcoin may continue to trade within a range until a clearer demand catalyst emerges.

data.title: Tether Gold holds more than half of the market share in gold-backed stablecoins, with gold reserves reaching 520,089.350 ounces in Q4 of last year.
data.description: Tether officially announced that Tether Gold accounts for more than half of the entire gold-backed stablecoin market, and XAUT's market capitalization has surpassed $4 billion. The company's key metrics as of the end of Q4 2025 include: Total physical gold reserves: 520,089.350 ounces (pure troy ounces); Total circulating XAU₮ tokens: 520,089.300000; XAUT gold reserves: 1:1, each XAU₮ token is backed by one ounce of pure troy ounce of physical gold. Total market capitalization: $2,246,458,120; Sold tokens: 409,217.640000; Number of XAUT tokens available for sale: 110,871.660000.

data.title: Strategy disclosed that it added 2,932 bitcoins last week.
data.description: Michael Saylor posted on the X platform that Strategy acquired 2,932 bitcoins, worth approximately $264.1 million, between January 19 and January 25. As of January 25, the company held 712,647 bitcoins, with an average purchase price of $76,037.

data.title: Silver Prices Rise Amid Interest Rate Speculations and Critical Mineral Status
data.description: Silver prices have experienced a significant increase, driven by diminished expectations for U.S. interest rate cuts and its recent classification as a critical mineral by the U.S. Department of the Interior. According to NS3.AI, this designation could lead to potential tariffs on silver, which may tighten supply and prompt U.S. importers to expedite their purchases. Additionally, retail investors are turning to silver as a more cost-effective safe-haven investment compared to gold, which is currently at historically high prices.

data.title: Singapore-based blockchain platform DigiFT launches bEQTY, a US stock income fund.
data.description: Singapore-based blockchain platform DigiFT announced the launch of its US equity income fund, bEQTY, on the Ethereum public blockchain. The fund aims to extend tokenization to actively managed listed stocks and is primarily targeted at accredited investors, enabling them to build more comprehensive, portfolio-related strategies on-chain. Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) is serving as the investment management service provider. (Fundselectorasia)

data.title: BitMart launches Decred (DCR)
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will list Decred (DCR) on January 26th at 21:00 (UTC+8), with the DCR/USDT trading pair available. Decred is a community-driven cryptocurrency designed to be a store of value that can be passed down through generations. Decred uses a hybrid Proof-of-Work (PoW) and Proof-of-Stake (PoS) consensus mechanism to ensure that PoW miners' power is not abused and that no group can change the consensus rules without community consent. 10% of the block reward goes to the Decred Project Foundation to ensure self-sufficiency in project development, while the remaining block reward is distributed between PoW miners (60%) and stakeholders (30%). Decred's on-chain governance is supplemented by the Politeia system, a blockchain-anchored, off-chain, Reddit-like online proposal voting platform where stakeholders vote on proposed changes to Decred governance and foundation spending.

data.title: Winter storms in the United States increased grid load, leading to longer BTC block generation times and forcing miners to reduce mining activity.
data.description: Extreme weather conditions in the United States have led to a voluntary halt to most Bitcoin mining activities, with the hashrate of the Foundry USA mining pool alone dropping by approximately 60% since last Friday. The combined hashrate of major US mining pools has decreased by about 200 EH/s, resulting in Bitcoin block production times exceeding 12 minutes. Foundry USA's hashrate has fallen from a recent peak of nearly 328 EH/s to approximately 139 EH/s. (The Block)

data.title: Strategists: Factors such as weakening expectations of a Fed rate cut may reshape the pricing logic of silver.
data.description: J. Safra Sarasin strategist Claudio Wewel points out that the continued surge in silver prices stems from weakened market expectations for a US interest rate cut and silver's newly acquired critical mineral status. The US Department of the Interior added silver to its critical mineral list in November, increasing the likelihood of US tariffs on the metal. He notes that this exacerbates the long-standing supply shortage and prompts US importers to accelerate silver purchases. Meanwhile, retail investors, finding it difficult to purchase gold at historically high prices, are turning to silver as a safe-haven asset. (Jinshi)

data.title: Analysis: Long-term BTC holders sold at a loss for the first time since October 2023, as the market trended towards risk aversion ahead of the Federal Reserve meeting.
data.description: Traders are currently focused on this week's Federal Reserve meeting, with interest rates expected to remain unchanged, but guidance from Fed Chairman Jerome Powell will be crucial. The recent decline in Bitcoin may be due to concerns about the strength of the yen and fiscal instability; however, a divergence has emerged between cryptocurrencies and traditional safe-haven assets, with funds flowing not into Bitcoin but into gold, pushing gold prices above $5,000/ounce for the first time. Greg Cipolaro, head of research at NYDIG, stated that liquidity preference dominates during periods of heightened uncertainty, and this dynamic has a greater impact on Bitcoin than on gold. CryptoQuant also reported in a previous report that long-term Bitcoin holders began selling at a loss for the first time since October 2023. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Valour receives approval from UK regulators to list BTC and ETH ETP on the London Stock Exchange.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed fintech company DeFi Technologies announced that its subsidiaries, Valour Inc. and Valour Digital Securities Limited, have received approval from UK regulators to offer exchange-traded Bitcoin and Ethereum products—1Valour Bitcoin Physical Staking and 1Valour Ethereum Physical Staking—to UK retail investors through the London Stock Exchange starting January 26, 2026. The company had previously launched an asset-backed Ethereum physical staking ETP for UK professional investors. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Challenges Amid Yen Intervention Concerns
data.description: Bitcoin is currently underperforming compared to gold as concerns about potential yen intervention impact risk assets worldwide. According to NS3.AI, the uncertainty surrounding currency intervention is prompting investors to turn to safer assets such as gold. Market participants are exercising caution due to the unclear outlook for risk-on investments.

data.title: LATEST:  Nifty Gateway has shifted into withdrawal-only mode and will shut down on Feb. 23, marking one of the most prominent closures amid the extended NFT market downturn.
